author: Allison Schiff
title: Why A 1967 Privacy Law Is Powering A New Wave Of Ad Tech Lawsuits
description: If you want to see a privacy lawyer who works in ad tech roll their eyes and heave a deep sigh, then speak aloud this acronym: “CIPA.” The California Invasion of Privacy Act, or CIPA, is a Cold War-era law that was passed in 1967 in response to concerns about…

author: Sam Bradley
title: The World Cup is set to lift demand for digital out-of-home spending
description: As buyers worry over high streaming prices and digital saturation, digital out-of-home firms angle for a greater spend during the World Cup.
